question: [File: 'File Name: rest/balances.js -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: getBalances()] Can an unprivileged external user send a request with account.id=0.0.1 (treasury account) and a timestamp filter, causing getBalances() to execute both getAccountBalanceTimestampRange() (which also queries the treasury account) and getBalancesQuery() against the same account, doubling the database load and delaying block processing by 500% or more of average block time?
